name: Agrunnos
description: Mysterious gargantuan ship capable of digging up entire subcontinent of a Earth-sized planet and maintain atmosphere within. Due to sheer scale it is potentially one of the most heavily armed and defended ship known with countless of turrets and ships parked within. Arrival of a hostile Agrunnos with full complement could spell end for entire civilization. Note: Due to extreme size and unknown space anomaly caused by the ship, it requires 200 times the Hyperdrive or Jump Drive of normal ship to function.

name: Aplomado
description: Started from some veteran pirates modifying their Falcon to suit their need of long range durable cargo ship which eventually results in the Aplomado. Very little of the Falcon it was based on is left as the ship was upgraded and redesigned over the years, with other pirate captain showing interest and present enough money the Aplomado eventually becomes mass produced.

name: Eleonorae
description: Originally heavily modified Tarazed Falcon by commissioned by some member of the Crossguard Patrol group to be used as long-range fast cruiser with built-in advanced sensors to fight pirates and catch smugglers. Now it's a complete redesign with some outline resemblance to the Tarazed Falcon. Unlike the expertly modified Marauder ships or Aplomado hastily built by pirates, the Eleonorae was optimized and constructed with some of the best tech in Human space, it was rumoured that some component is actually derived from confidential military-grade technology. This made it potentially the of the most advanced warship civilian could get their hand on.

name: Battle Bulk
description: Results of pirates wondering what to do with captured Bulk Freighters as they were too slow and cumbersome for smuggling. The Battle Bulk were often used to battle against rival gang or the navy.

name: Battle Behemoth
description: To improve upon the Behemoth's already decent combat capability the pirates made extensive modifications to it and turn it into proper warship with large cargo hold perfect for plundering.

name: Culverin Class
description: A large arsenal ship recently developed and deployed by the navy. The Culverin Class arsenal ship carries over dozens of missile launchers and over half a thousand missiles to saturate the entire battlefield with enough missiles to easily overwhelm even the best anti-missile system available.

name: Spetum Class
description: Republic Navy Spetum Class Fleetcarrier is a massive carrier that doubles as mobile headquarter projecting power not only within the system but also to nearby systems. Spetum Class is the first spaceship to carry a complement of fighters on par with wet navy carriers of 20th century. With over 5 times more capacity than older carrier fleets appearance of a single Spetum Class can turn the tide of a battle. Public reaction was mixed, while the ship itself it a feat of engineering and a mark of progress in a way some thought the budget could've been better spent else where. Though the ship will be a major deterrence against pirates some were also concerned about the lives of fighter pilots who where often just cannon fodder. Nevertheless armchair generals were all at least somewhat satisfied with what they would consider an actual carrier.

name: Ranseur Class
description: The Ranseur Class is considered a sub-class of Spetum with several major improvements across the broad.

name: Dulle Griet Class
description: Dulle Griet class fast battleship was developed as a solution to very limited production capacity of Canaveral Naval Yard thus another design was drafted up. The fast battleship was designed to be smaller and easier to build allowing more shipyard to build them in times of need. Unlike the Claymore which was designed to take on entire fleet by itself Dulle Griet could serve both as flagship for small patrol and escort for larger carriers like Spetum or Lucerne. Dulle Griet class primary armament is the advanced Eteron torpedoes to shatter any opposing warship before whittling the last of them down with 4 dual V85 railgun turrets and array of flakcannons.

name: Grose Bochse Class
description: Stemming from the same development line the Grose Bochse is designed to fit the ExP302 Railcannon, a slightly smaller version of the Railcannon used by Lucerne class and Claymore class now build into a smaller, cheaper, and easier to build frame. With tremendous firepower and range these ships were intended to form the backline of a battle bombarding enemy ships from far beyond their reach.

name: Claymore Class
description: Developed shortly after the alien attack at Farpoint as dedicated weapon platform very heavily armed with multiple large anti-capital turrets enough to shred most warships in seconds, it is essentially a mobile battlestation to fend off against future alien attack.

name: Lucerne Class
description: Republic Navy Supercarrier-Battleship hybrid heavily armed with multiple railgun turrets capable of tearing down smaller ships in seconds. While officially claimed to be recently developed to face against future alien invasion threat it was rumoured to be in research and development long before the war with Free Worlds for potential aggression from the Quarg or someone as advanced as them. The ship itself is by far the largest interstellar vessel ever built by humanity truly going into the territory of mobile space station rather as their scale could be measured in kilometers.

Missions: MGF Addition: ATHI: NI Quarg Assistance 2
MGF Addition: Wanderers: Sestor: Farpoint Attack 2 (Lucerne)

name: Nasprite
description: Nasprite is a modernization of a dated armoured freighter design from the first turf war made to withstand combat and long travel. Though originates from the core, most of these are now found operating around the Dirt Belt.

name: FR-4 Dart
description: This was made with the goal of creating the smallest and cheapest spaceship possible. With everything reduced to the minimum, the FR-4 Dart was designed as an even cheaper alternative to the Betelgeuse Shuttle. Despite its' fragility, this ship is fast enough to outrun nearly everything else in human space.

name: Wisymton
description: A tugboat from early days of space trading made to transport cargo containers between ground and space. Designed when repulsor engines were still in their infancy, many ships from the previous era still lack one or were not designed to enter the atmosphere at all. In modern times where all freighters come equipped with repulsor engines, the roles for these tugboats changed to assisting these large and cumbersome ships to land, not unlike their sea-bound ancestor.

name: CF-50 Cart
description: This is a small and cheap mining vessel designed as an alternative to the Tarazed Sparrow, for pilots don't mind a little bit of waiting for more pay.

name: CY-10 Dragonfly
description: This is a small and agile heavy-lift spacecraft. It can be used for transporting containers or as a method of quickly delivering or recovering fighters. It is also often used for lifting within atmosphere on various occasions, including assisting in the construction of tall buildings or delivering supplies to inaccessible areas. 	[Carries: Nothing, you shouldn't see or use this.]

name: CH-6 Carrack
description: Carrack is an old heavy freighter for long range shipping, dating back to early days of the Republic. It has enough bays for a small complement of fighters, to assist with landing and other tasks, back in the days. In more recent times these bays often carry combat fighters to help defend the ship.

name: LCC-3 Sierra
description: This is a large hyperspace fuel tanker by Pioneer Heavy Industries. It is one of the latest fuel distribution tanker for transporting fuel from refineries to spaceports and non-refinery stations.

name: RF-03 Gerlache
description: An old fleet tanker ship dating from early days of space exploration where hyperdrives were much more inefficient and inhabited planets were few, this came with bays for smaller fuel distribution ships, allowing fuel to be distributed among the fleet faster. It also comes with a built-in ramscoop to slowly produce fuel as it travels. Very few are seen nowadays as the galaxy becomes more inhabited.

name: LGC-3 Mesa
description: A purpose-built gas tanker used for shipping large amount of gas in liquefied or compressed form across the galaxy. Relatively rare due to their specialized nature mostly running along a few industrial worlds. Lightly armed but also less likely to attract pirate attention due to difficulty of storing and maintaining liquefied or compressed gas, making it one of the least economical targets for them. While pretty much useless in most situations, a gas tanker allows you to take special, very well paid jobs on some industrial planets. 	Due to nature of liquefied gas requiring extremely low temperature to maintain, any overheating can damage the tanks over time and eventually can cause it to burst. For that reason gas tanker captains must keep a close eye on their temperature at all time and make sure the temperature is always below the limit.

name: LXC-2 Strata
description: This is a purpose-built chemical tanker for shipping various industrial chemicals, including highly corrosive acids, with efficiency unmatched by regular freighters. Due to their specialized nature these ships are also rarer and most often found in route between industrial planets or close by. With the difficulty of efficiently maintaining transported chemicals combined with requiring special ports to unload the stored liquid, these vessels are less preferred target for pirates. While not useful in general shipping between most worlds, these ships profit of their extreme specialization to take on fewer but much more profitable jobs which are only offered on industrialized worlds.

name: LVC-2 Sandura
description: A specialized roll-on roll-off ship for efficiently transporting land vehicles in large number, by having the interior laid out akin to parking lot, allowing vehicles to be driven on and off the ship by itself fast and easily without having to wait for cranes. Because the interior is essentially a large empty space, other cargo can also be stored, allowing it to be more flexible than other specialized ships like tankers. 	Because of the highly valuable cargo and relative lack of defences these ships rely heavily on escorts for protection.

name: LPC-3 Lavaka
description: A large oil carrier designed and built by Pioneer Heavy Industries, the Lavaka-class is designed to ship either crude oil or other petroleum products in bulk across large distance with unmatched efficiency. The Lavaka-class is also one of the largest ships that were designed and built by Pioneer HI.

name: LPC-2 Atletha
description: A smaller predecessor to the Lavaka tanker. Though it is designed to carry both crude and product oil, since the development of larger oil tankers most of Atletha-class in service now serve as product tanker.

name: LAC-4 Lithalsa
description: Lithalsa is a specialized bitumen tanker with heated tanks to maintain the cargo liquidity and prevent it from solidifying. Though only a relatively small quantity of bitumen is required for most construction, several on going projects especially on developing worlds can require significant amount of bitumen. Because the service area for these ships often lack specialized discharge facilities the Lithalsa comes with its' own discharging system for unloading its cargo directly onto trucks or other transports to distribute it to the site.

name: SMC-2 Kipuka
description: Kipuka is a specialized type of chemical tanker dedicated to carrying molasses. To ensure easy flow of molasses when filling and discharging, each tank is equipped with a special temperature management system that can evenly heat the liquid across the tank to maintain low enough viscosity during unloading process. The ship also employs a slightly different loading system to minimize foaming as well as specialized sensor to avoid inaccuracies from said foaming of the cargo. Because of the additional requirement for tank cleaning, these molasses tankers also come equipped with a special type of automatic tank cleaner to satisfy the requirement and reduce running cost.

name: FG-5 Bluewhale
description: Bluewhale is a massive freighter for hauling large amount of cargo across the galaxy. Due to its' cost these ships are often owned by freight companies rather than individuals. While it's capable of carrying much more cargo than most other freighters, one of the major complaints received from captains is that it can take very long to reach the innermost container. That said it is still far faster and easier than handling of bulk cargo.

name: SBS-12 Ossun
description: The Ossun is a power station ship modified from the Bluewhale hull to serve as temporary power station for remote colonies or as an additional source for area with high demand while a new stationary power plant is being built. Because it spends most of its operation on the ground, very few of these ships can ever be seen flying around.

name: FG-6 Startrain
description: Startrain is a medium ranged freighter offered by Freight Galactic with more limited cargo capacity than other cargo ships from the same shipyard. In exchange, it is much faster to unload, equating to shorter time in port and faster deliveries.

name: FG-7 Conveyor
description: The Conveyor is a massive freighter designed and built by Freight Galactic with a special mechanism for quickly unloading cargo, independent of port equipment. It also has extra ports for resupplying, theoretically allowing them to trade much faster than ships of similar size. In practice this is debatable as few ports can keep up with the sheer amount of cargo due to various other factors. 	The Conveyor is also capable of carrying a small squadron of fighters to protect itself, and due to number of fighters carried, almost matching entire capacity of the Navy Carrier there were attempts to have it restricted. However, the CEO of the company simply told them to come get an actual carrier. It is rumoured that the company was responsible for the development of the more recent Spetum class carrier.

name: FG-8 Shipment
description: The smallest and cheapest cargo ship currently made by Freight Galactic. Though not as well armed as their typical product, it can carry decent amount of cargo for the size. The ship is also installed with equipment to independently and rapidly unload its container for faster operation at port.

name: FG-11 Starcarrier
description: A mid-sized container ship offering both great capacity and the benefits of containerization.

name: FG-10 Exchanger
description: Inspired by the Syndicate H-class super container ship, a smaller freighter development was halted in favor of an even larger freighter, perhaps the largest freighter to ever be developed in human space. The hull of the smaller predecessor in development was modified and used as the Exchanger primary cargo arms that can be deployed to land and unload cargo, as the Exchanger itself is too large to land on any port. 	To protect itself the ship carries a vast array of armaments rivalling most warships as well as entire wings of fighters to protect itself. Though the sub cargo ships attached to the arms can be deployed, they were stripped down too much to serve as effective combat ship on its' own. In addition there is also a longer delay to deploy, as they were not designed for immediate action.

name: FTV-33 Acareus
description: Fancy experimental freighter as more heavily armed alternative to the older Carrack. While a relatively large number of containers are exposed for easier unloading, the unusual angle negates the benefit as ports are unable to utilize standardized automations to unload it and require manual unloading with smaller vehicles.

name: SMM-111 Bagger
description: The Bagger is one of the largest mining vehicles ever made, and in addition to that the Bagger is also capable of sorting and processing ores on-site, along with machines to turn them into functional parts. It is essentially a mobile factory and an asteroid miner combined. 	In a different evolution to the Sunder school of sending ships to the asteroid, the Bagger came from the line that sends entire base and process the raw material on-site. While earlier designs were plauged with problems and inefficiencies, later iterations found themselves one of the backbone of heavy industries especially in the frontiers with limited equipment.

name: HMM-190 Kotroger
description: The Kotroger is a terrestrial mining vehicle with spaceflight capability for rapidly hopping from planets to planets or even within the planet itself as each resource pool is drained, as well as moving to assist excavation on other sites or large construction projects requiring earth to be moved in large amounts. While not as economical as old-school ground-based excavators, its primary strength lies in the extreme mobility compared to a regular excavator. It can easily move itself from site to site and begin operation within the same day, while regular ones may take days or weeks to disassemble, pack, and move, then repeat in reverse at the new site. Though it may be unnecessary on larger resource pools it allows the Kotroger to more economically extract resource from smaller pools of rarer materials that may otherwise be uneconomical for regular excavators to operate on. Though it is not recommended by both the manufacturer and safety organizations, the ship is built with extra heavy-duty long-duration repulsor engines that can fire constantly for longer periods which may allow it to temporarily mine resources from less stable terrain with repulsor engines active to minimize the pressure it puts on the ground.

name: EM-1V Sunder
description: The Sunder is a versatile mining platform equipped with dedicated prospecting equipment, most notably an undercarriage that supports two Mining Drones. The lineage of this ship can be traced back to the old asteroid mining ships used in the Sol Main Belt centuries ago. This is a variant of the design built by Espion with their own equipment and improved durability.

name: EM-8A Armadillo
description: Espion-exclusive light mining carrier with sizeable squadron of drones and fighters for defending itself, or help mining and collecting materials.

name: EM-28F Wombat
description: Espion-exclusive mining carrier, or rather a mobile mining and refinery station to extract and process resources on the go as due to its large cargo holds it may spend much of its time in flight to collect a full cargo of resources. Because of its size and slowness, the vessel is less than ideal for mining and collecting resources itself, but instead relies on a sizable fleet of fighters and drones to mine and collect resources for it. To protect their miners from harm as they operate far away from the mothership, the Wombat also comes with space for 4 pocket light warships to guard the miners.

name: SV-4450 Sovereign
description: The Sovereign is a massive carrier and worldship of mysterious origins. It is said that this ship was designed many years ago for an expedition to outside of known space. No one knows the fate of the project and only the ships remain today in few private hands.

name: MGF: Nasprite
description: Nasprite is a modernization of a dated armoured freighter design from the first turf war made to withstand combat and long travel. Though originates from the core, most of these are now found operating around the Dirt Belt.

name: CK50T Stahbar
description: This is a large armoured freighter with decent armaments, which is also plated with special material for scattering radar, making it more difficult for radar-based missiles to lock-on. According to the company representative however, this feature was an accident as they were developing their coating.

name: CK40T Treibard
description: Smaller and cheaper version of the company's CK50T Stahbar, with improved anti-radar capability and lighter armament.

name: CK80T Tlielart
description: A massive freighter designed to carry as much cargo as possible, and did so exceedingly that it surpass the capacity of every other ships by far. Though unlike the other ships from MarStel Industries, it is very lightly armed relative to cargo capacity, making it lack the firepower to properly protect itself and neither does it have the speed to dodge any raider. Due to such reasons, it will require decent escort to safely travel. 	Though it carries more than most, if not all, freighters in human space, the sheer amount of cargo that has to be unloaded requires ungodly amount of time, equipment, and manpower, which only gets worse when loading cargo. Any less than a well developed urban spaceport will struggle to service the ship and often will take a few days to complete the operation, if they ever require this much cargo in the first place. This results in the ship being not quite a popular choice in most of human space, as few planets require this much cargo in a single delivery and fewer capable of handling it.

name: PF-80 Intrepid
description: The Intrepid is a recently developed protected freighter with heavy armour and decent firepower to hold off pirates on its own, while also being fast enough to outrun heavier ships.

name: FF-30 Volant
description: A recently developed cheap and fast blockade runner for quickly flying past pirate-infested areas. Lightly protected and not designed for any combat.

name: PT-60 Gallant
description: A Solomons Voidworks protected tanker ship for shipping crude oil and other petroleum products from and across the Southern space. Heavily armoured and armed, the Gallant provides excellent protection against any pirates it might come across. While the difficulty of handling bulk liquid cargo deters many pirates from stealing it, reports of raid on oil tankers are not unheard of. It is suspected that they either have no other targets or they were attempts to capture the entire ship.

name: PL-50 Impavid
description: A well defended livestock transport for shipping various live exports from the southern worlds to their destination safely. Unlike its sea-bound ancestor which can simply have an open deck for air, the cargo decks of a spacefaring livestock transport require dedicated climate control systems to ensure proper air circulation and comfortable ride for the animals, as well as reduce the smells and gases for when the crew have to perform tasks within the cargo deck. 	Freshly butchered meat is known to be highly preferred over frozen meat by the wealthy, creating a lucrative trade route between the South and Paradise Planets for these specialized freighters.

name: FC-022 Castello
description: Reminiscent of refuelling barges used in older days before uses of replusor engines became more widespread with freighters, when most ships would park in orbit unloading cargo via tugboats and refueled by dedicated fuel barges like the Castello. In modern times refuelling barges are occasionally used by some companies to rapidly refuel freighters mid-flight and extend their range without requiring the slow and cumbersome freighters to visit the port.

name: SKVS-2 Mudskipper
description: Small, lightly armed freighter for short-ranged shipping from an earlier and more peaceful era. These are most often seen in more secure areas of space as they lack any effective defense against pirates nor the range to travel far beyond their homeport.

name: SKVS-3 Gudgeon
description: Slightly larger version of the Mudskipper, the Gudgeon is possibly one of the most efficient cargo vessel around, but also the most defenceless and slow for its size. Though few captains enjoy piloting them, they all agree it is one of the most robust and easy to maintain.

name: SKVS-4 Minnow
description: A water tanker ship for transporting fresh water to nearby colonies or stations which are incapable of generating enough fresh water for themselves. The Minnow itself is slow and lightly armed making it incapable of defending itself or escaping from any threat, which makes it less ideal for travelling to frontier worlds alone with the rise of piracy. 	Now that most colonies are developed enough to supply their own water, these ships have become much rarer as the need for them decreases. Only a small number remain parked in systems that have stations for occasional resupply mission.

name: CWC-2 Celestine
description: A custom-built wine tanker for the Luna Winery made to transport wine in bulk and preserve it in the most perfect condition, with individual thermal control system for each tank to keep the heat as stable as possible. 	Because these ships are lightly armed, they rarely wander away from the relative safety of heavily patrolled Paradise Planets.

name: CJC-3 Citrus
description: The Citrus-class is a purpose built fruit juice tanker for the Solacer Group, mainly for transporting frozen concentrated juice with minimal water content for maximum space efficiency. The concentrated juice would then be mixed with water and packaged at destination facility to be distributed.

name: TQK-20 Qaytas
description: A specialized bulk-in bag-out ship designed in cooperation between Vefrol Dockyards and Pioneer Heavy Industries for the Core Food Corporation. This is to allow transportation of bulk sugar and in-ship bagging at destination to decrease port time during unloading, resulting in overall faster turnaround. The ship lacks large cargo loading hatches to maintain a closed system free of contaminants and instead loads via special sealed conveyor belts built into the ship. Its' built-in bagging facilities utilize the latest technology for fast and highly efficient packaging operation. Bagged sugar can be unloaded at the port far faster than in bulk as well as having the benefit of being less reliant on specialized sugar unloading equipment and storage that most ports do not have.

name: QYG-30 Qazan
description: A fast and well armoured freighter for medium-range shipping. Preferred by some captains for greater manoeuvrability compared to Syndicate Freighter.

name: QYG-60 Sandiq
description: A larger and longer ranged version of the QYG-30 Qazan to fill in the gap between the Qazan and heavy freighters around the Core and North area.

name: QYG-30r Qazan
description: A modified version of the Qazan with refrigerated cargo holds to allow it to maintain the perfect temperature for carrying perishable goods over long distances without the need for individual refrigerated containers, where more space is taken up for the individual cooling systems as well as cost for their maintenance. Due to the modification the cargo space is slightly reduced but still more efficient than carrying multiple refrigerated containers.

name: QYG-70r Tonazqi
description: A dedicated reefer ship for carrying and keeping perishable goods refrigerated in bulk over distance, with dedicated cargo hold cooling systems as well as a dedicated freezer section for storing cargo that requires an even lower temperature to transport safely.

name: LMS-43 Mullsammler
description: This ship was designed to collect garbage from various colonies in the days before they built their own garbage processing plants. With their compactors these ships can collect several times more cargo than a regular freighter. Even after a processing plant was built on a planet these vessels are still used to collect garbage from various settlements scattered around the planet. The ship is equipped with six compactors to quickly load the garbage, though practically the crew said three is more than enough for most small settlements this ship would be visiting and all compactors will only be utilized in more urban areas.

name: AD-012C Iaphia
description: An expensive, fast, and fancy freighter designed for captains who prefer speed. Some captains of weathier origins also prefer it because of the less boxy look compared to other freighters.

name: AD-019A Iabayi
description: A larger fancy freighter for richer captains who might want to fly a ship with more cargo space than the Iaphia or travel longer distances.

name: AD-0032 Ialmuslati
description: A fast mid-sized transport offered by Najrmalas Shipworks as they saw the few competitors in the market. The Ialmuslati, while expensive, offers more speed, as well as a business-class suite for better-paying customers.

name: TS-650 Herrenbal
description: A mid-sized transport to fill in the gap between Blackbird and Star Queen, as well as serving as an economy-class transport.

name: TS-CH0 Kratzbal
description: A fast and well-armed transport for hauling large amounts of people across long distances as a non-luxury alternative to the Star Queen.

name: TS-1L260 Mieusbar
description: A huge liner for mass transportation across vast distances. The development was partially sponsored by some of the southern worlds in effort to provide cheaper transportation for migrating workers and low-budget tourists, specifically those coming to the southern area.

name: AsK12-6 Celjurai
description: A luxury sight-seeing transport, offering larger view areas for more people. This allows transport companies to offer more exclusive seats and reap in extra profit at minimal cost.

name: S-PT06 Harukaze
description: The MJK Heavy Industries Harukaze was developed as a faster alternative to the Betelguese Heavy Shuttle, also with improved protection as well as utilizing turret mounta instead of fixed guns, allowing it to defend itself while maneuvering out of harm's way. The interior is also considered to be a bit fancier than most other transports, but not quite fancy enough to attract more wealthy passengers.

name: CDB-6K Jupiter
description: A dry bulk carrier geared with derricks for unloading cargo in less-equipped ports, in the earlier days of bulk interstellar trade. Unlike container ships, these bulk carriers can be loaded with unpacked dry cargoes like ores and grain directly in their cargo bays, lessening the need for the cargo to be packaged from the destination.

name: CDB-12K Saturn
description: A class of even larger dry bulk carriers than the Jupiter as exports and demand grew. Unfortunately, due to the lack of unloading gears, it's operation is limited to fewer more well equipped ports. In addition to its' bulk bays it can also carry significant amount of containers, allowing captains to earn additional profit.

name: FPd45 Clinker
description: A hatchless self-unloading cargo ship specialized for carrying and handling powdered cargoes like cement. Because of the specially designed cargo holds and loading and unloading systems for granulated cargo, it cannot be used to transport any other kind of cargo. 	The Clinker was built in response to the growing demand for cement as small colonies grew into cities, though this model requires port-side facilities to properly unload directly to vehicles and will often only travel between ports with proper equipment.

name: FAd36 Flint
description: The Flint-class is a purpose-built bulk freighter for carrying aggregates. It is equipped with conveyor belts for loading and unloading to allow the vessel to operate independently of port equipment, increasing the number of ports it can visit. As per requirement of some cargo the cargo hold of this ship is also equipped with moisture control system to maintain the most ideal condition for its cargo.

name: FUe02a Gebrant
description: A general heavy freight pusher introduced before the forming of the Republic. Designed to clamp or deploy cargo containers in orbit where transporting it to the ground is handled by a tug, though with recent advancements basically all modern containers are equipped with their own landing gear to allow the ship to detach the container at the port by itself. Though not super popular like the Haulers, it is still preferred by several captains for its versatility of being to able to quickly latch onto multiple types of cargo pods allow them to quickly adapt to whatever the market demands.

name: FUe04a Gebrant II
description: A Gebrant with two cargo containers attached.

name: FUe06a Gebrant III
description: Three containers is generally considered the maximum this container model can be safely stacked without risk of snapping during turns. Though one of the cheapest and most efficient freighters around it's far less viable today, as pirates can easily overwhelm the very lightly-armed freighter forcing it to either operate within the safe area or with heavily armed escorts.

name: SRC-41C Curie
description: The Curie-class is a purpose-built nuclear fuel carrier dedicated to transporting all sorts of radioactive cargo, like fresh nuclear fuel, spent nuclear fuel, and radioactive waste, with multiple redundancies for all critical systems, from engines, cooling system, electrical systems to navigation systems as well as reinforced bulkheads to resist even the most extreme accident while keeping their cargo intact. Though the bridge is visible, it is reinforced with additional armour and is mainly only used for landing and on-ground operations like unloading the cargo, with the ship's primary control room buried deep inside the ship, with another layer of armour around it, not unlike what one would have expected from a warship. With the requirement to keep the cargo cool all the time the ship also has a built-in dedicated cooling system for the cargo hold, which is isolated from the cooling systems for the rest of the ship as well as having its own backup generator. Though all radioactive cargo comes with its own radiation shielding container, the material for this ship's cargo hold is also selected to provide decent amount of shielding as well. 	Another part of the ship's safety includes crews specially trained to handle radioactive cargo as well as responding to various foreseeable incidents, from collision, fire, and pirates boarding, in the most unlikely case that it occurs. In addition to that, the ship is also equipped for in-flight repairs, allowing the ship to perform rudimentary repairs on itself if damaged, though there is a small delay before the repair can begin and longer delay if the ship got disabled. Because all of these facts the ship's minimum crew is almost the same as chemical tankers of larger size and operating cost is one of the highest.

name: DSSN-S90 Lynchyoseu
description: This is the DSSE Shipbuilding specialized fishing and fish processing vessel built to operate in both sea and space. It utilizes a uniquely engineered multi-mode engine that can operate efficiently both in sea, air, and vacuum. 	Unlike regular trawlers, this vessel can use its repulsor engines to lift itself just above the water, significantly increasing speed for the vessel, which allows it to catch fish faster as well as being able to catch some faster exotic fishes with a method called by some sailors "skimming". Due to these maneuvers the net is also designed to resist such speed and force as well as allowing it to hold many more fish than standard trawler nets. The captured fish can be quickly pulled inside the ship to be processed into fillet, block, canned or other forms as required before being sent to the frozen cargo holds to keep it from spoiling. Its ability to travel at higher speed in air also means the ship can travel between fishing spots far faster than standard water-bound fishing vessels, though this is done less often, as the extra strain means more maintenance later on, which can be uneconomical if done too often. Another unique option for these vessels is that it can be very opportunistic in stormy worlds where they can quickly snatch up rare marine animals unique to that world during a small window of calm sea and bail out at the last minute before the heavy storms and high waves hit them. 	Its space capability is also often utilized by owners of these vessels to rapidly move them around between worlds, as market demand shifts and new species of edible fish are discovered or between known types due to random influences. In addition to solo operations, these ships also have option of serving as mothership and carring two additional ships to assist the operation on longer expeditions for a more continuous supply of fish, while processed products are offloaded to another reefer ship whence the product is delivered to the port. 	Because of its adaptability and high efficiency, these vessels are almost universally hated by local fishermen, especially among worlds whose main export is marine products, to the point some worlds are considering the possibility of banning or greatly restricting the usage of these ships.

name: DSSN-C40 Dulumi
description: The Dulumi is a purpose-built boat and yacht carrier with a single large bay that can hold most yachts except for the largest of luxury yachts. The ship is designed to park in the water where its cargo can float in and out with ease along with an automatic adaptive support system to hold the boats up as the water is drained. It also has fancy passenger accomodations to serve as mini cruise liner while transporting the owner and crew of these yachts as well as other passenger heading the same way.

name: G-Class Container Transport
description: To compete with the newer, more modern heavy freighters dominating the market, the Syndicate stacked their Container Transport into a huge Heavy Container Transport, tripling capacity but also slowing it down even further from its already despised slug-pace. With barely any additional crew requirement from its predecessor, the G-Class Container Transport cargo-to-crew ratio is absolutely unmatched. 	Though still not the most capacious in the area, it can carry a pair of drones to either defend itself with or assist during unloading operations in less well-equipped ports.

name: H-Class Super Container Ship
thumbnail: thumbnail/mgf syn hclass super container thumb
description: This massive super container ship is the next step in the Syndicate's attempt to regain dominance over the heavy freighter market, with over double the capacity of the previous largest freighter. Similarly to its predecessor, the G-Class Container Transport, it carries a fleet of drones to assist in unloading, as well as allowing it to unload at smaller spaceports that may not be able to handle its size, by simply parking in orbit and transporting containers to surface with the ship's own drones and tugboats from the port instead. This allows the ship to visit most if not all ports without worrying about landing area or unloading gears delivering both large and small amount of cargo to various destination.

name: UA-10 Porter
description: The Porter is a small drone for assisting in the cargo unloading operation of the Syndicate new freighter the G-Class. It is especially useful on less equipped worlds. The drone also comes with an anti-missile turret to assist in defense as merchant captains often deploy all their fighters and drones in combat, even if those ships would be useless in a fight.

name: J-Class Container Feeder
description: A compact freighter designed to be carried and assist the K-Class unload its containers. Purpose-built to quickly latch on to entire block of Syndicate containers, it can rapidly transport up to 64 containers between the mothership and the spaceport at a time, permitting an unmatched unloading rate on the market. 	With an attachment plate capable of being raised and lowered, it is also capable of carrying general cargo for short-distance hauls. However, due to the entire lack of armament it is rarely seen flying between systems.

name: K-Class Ultra Container Ship

turrets.parallel: #Parallel to force them to not converge and result in some weird angle.

thumbnail: thumbnail/mgf syn kclass ultra container thumb
description: This is the Syndicate take on a superheavy freighter, capable of carrying over a hundred times more than a regular Container Transport and three times more than any of its competitors. Due to its design, the ship cannot land without dedicated gear to accept it and is intended to stay in orbit instead, while a fleet of transfer ships carried with it unload the cargo in bulk. Due to the size of its bays it can even carry heavy warships alongside to protect itself.

name: SV80-n Catirfel
description: Catirfels were first built to satisfy a specific requirement for a shipping company before being mass produced and sold on public market. It offered an overall improvement over the standard Syndicate Bulk Freighter. Each cargo pod can carry both regular break-bulk cargo and dry bulk cargo while also being detachable, allowing more flexibility and faster port time. The ship also features a crane for assisting unloading operations in less equipped ports, which can be retracted and hidden inside the hull to protect it from in-flight damage.

name: SV40-n Navilel
description: A slightly bigger version of the Catirfel with all cargo pods arranged on the same side, for ease of access and unloading at port. The ship is also equipped with a large array of missile launchers to deter pirates, who are becoming stronger as time progress.

name: TMS-64 Kernstoff
description: A purpose-built tritium carrier with special equipment to maintain stability of the tritium over some distance, as well as multiple layers of protection to keep its cargo safe. Often used to deliver supplies to reactors or carry waste products from such reactors. Similarly to other vessels dedicated to carrying highly radioactive cargo, it is built to the highest standard with multiple redundancies and reinforcement for every critical systems allowing the ship to survive and function while sustaining damage that would've disabled other ships of similar size. 	Unlike the Curie-class built by the Syndicate, which heavily relies on escort to ward off pirates this ship is relatively heavily armed to allow it to defend itself to a degree, but in most case still travels with escorts to ensure security.

name: EMS-28 Niessbarkurier
description: A specialized chemical tanker for carrying edible liquid with food grade tanks and pumps each individually equipped with dedicated refrigeration system. Unlike other tankers with minimal armament, this ship comes with enough turret mounts to rival even warships and deter pirates who seem to take interest in raiding and capturing these vessels.

name: Typ115 Qiongsha
description: The CCS Corp. entry for budget freighter market. A small step up from the Syndicate Star Barge, the Qiongsha offers almost double the cargo capacity as well as all the benefits of containerized cargo. The Qiongsha is an ideal ship for a captain looking for something with more capacity than a Star Barge but without the money to buy a Freighter. 	With the low cost and high capacity the price is paid elsewhere. The container carrier is designed to the barest minimum required to fly and meet safety standards. It's said to be even more difficult to fly and land than the Syndicate Freighter by some captains, due to location of the cockpit and cheap sensors. Minimal durability and defense while carrying more cargo also make it an even more attractive target for pirates, so much so that many insurance companies refuse to cover it outside specific safe zones.

name: Typ124 Lianyungang
description: The latest heavy freighter from CCS Corp. designed to be a solution to modern shipping. With the increasing demand and the raise of piracy, the Lianyungang is an armoured freighter designed to handle both by being very heavily armoured to protect its cargo but also able rotate the cargo outward for unloading to provide fast and easy access to the containers, unlike other armoured freighters which have to sacrifice either convienience or capacity for protection.

name: F-HF51 Kinesaki
description: Kinesaki is one of MJK Heavy Industries ancient freighter design developed shortly before the first turf war. For the time it was viewed as freighter of the future with rather comfortable living quarter compared to other freighter of the time. It's also known to be fairly capable in combat and contributes to significant amount of firepower in combat. There's even stories of some that served as powerful Q-Ship, one so lethal that few survived to tell the tale. Over time, Kinesaki-class were slowly phased out for newer, more efficient, and better protected cargo ships. Last of its' class was decommissioned from NGK fleet a few decades before the formation of the Republic. 	Although outdated and largely outperformed by more modern ships, it is still good enough for few merchants and small companies to keep it in service. While unlikely due to sheer amount of it built over time, it's probable that some of these ships in service may well be over half-millenia old. 	With the production of Kinesaki-class officially ceased centuries ago, most that are on sale right now are ancient stocks from since. With the condition varying from heavily repaired to basically brand new, suspiciously new even.

name: C1-B Grainger
description: An ancient cargo ship in service before the Alpha War. Its' builder was one of the corporation that was merged into the Syndicate and since long forgotten. It was one of the backbone of interstellar ore trade as older freighters that lack repulsor engines are fading out. Many of this model were lost in the following instability and war and fades out of relevance due to its' fragility and lack sufficient weaponry to protect itself. 	Due to sheer number built, a few of these relics survived until today, mostly in collector's warehouses or permanently grounded as housing for some early colonies. Though it's completely out-performed by modern freighters in every measure, a few can still be seen flying for various reason.

name: ICT-300 Exofreighter
description: A recent freighter from Bellwing. Although rather low capacity compared to other freighter of similar size, it boast far better shielding and greater speed.

name: ICT-450 Orion
description: Bigger sister of Bellwing's Exofreighter. It utilizes some of the best and most efficient shield emitter to provide unmatched level of protection in the class.

name: IPV-430 Cygnus
description: Bellwing's offering for a modern economic mass-transport ship.

name: KS-32 Rogov
description: A rugged and heavily armed freighter from KDB. Developed after the company found the Syndicate Freighter perfomance unsatisfactory. Although slower, Rogov-class is better protected and armed allowing it to stand up against attackers on its' own.

name: KS-46 Nikolayev
description: A heavily armed freighter emerging from period of instability shortly before the Alpha War. Equipped with array of weapons and defenses as well as heavy armour to ensure the safety of their cargo from pirates and privateer. Nikolayev-class providing warship level of firepower with capacity of freighter allows corporation's fleet to travel with less escort freeing up warships for other tasks. Due to it's design, armour and defence it's also occasionally used as troop transport and landing. 	While largely outdated, several of these can still be found in use for simple reason that it still works.

name: KS-58 Vinograd
description: Following the success of the Nikolayev-class, KDB designed another bigger armed freighter. Although only a few were completed before the Alpha War before production came to a halt because of it. The production resumed some period after the war but never to the scale it was originally intended to be. The construction of these vessel is largely stopped towards the formation of the Republic. 	Although very outdated, these vessels is somehow not entirely gone from active merchant fleets. A small number of them can also be found in service of some Dirt Belt and Southern planet mostly as part of reserve fleet.

name: MGF: RRS-031 Growler
description: The Growler is more of a large personal yatch for the weathly than a transport. Equipped with four Particle Cannons to deal with pirates if required.

name: MGF: RRS-009 Clematis
description: VRR Shipyard's luxury transport. Well known for their dampened living area that can significantly reduce felt inertia and silence out all but the largest atomic engines.

name: UDV-1 Packet
description: This is a small drone used by ICS for planetary deliveries.

name: AKH-8 Mlitgante
description: This is a compact tow ship developed and used by the crews of Ankulah station to tow in wreckage from around the system and other systems nearby. With over half of its mass dedicated to engine area, it can be packed with very powerful engines and pull even the largest wreckages around and do so economically.

name: AFFR-3 Fylla
description: An old refuelling fighter design from earlier days of space travel, often carried by the largest ships or a fleet tanker to refuel other ships in the fleet.

name: CK10C Liathtar
description: Inspired by Syndicate G-Class and its companion Porter drone, the MarStel shipyard developed a new fighter to assist its freighter when unloading cargo, specifically its carrier variant of Tlielart-class.

name: EP-2 Marmot
description: A piloted mining fighter developed and used by Espion Mining Co. Due to their specialized nature these fighters come with built-in asteroid scanners.

Missions: MGF: Espion: Neodymium at Delta Velorum

name: EP-1 Mole
description: An automated mining drone developed and used by Espion Mining Co. Due to their specialized nature these drones come with built-in asteroid scanners.

Missions: MGF: Espion: Neodymium at Delta Velorum

name: EP-3 Rat
description: Espion Mining co. compact gunship to be carried by their larger carriers for guarding the mining fleets while they are away from the mothership.

name: AYS-17 Proetida
description: Not long after the development of the Geocoris the Hai found their freighters outmatched again with the arrival of a new human fleet that has even larger freighters, forcing them to develop a newer and even bigger ship to match. While not being able to match the largest of human freighters yet due to their shipyard being highly optimized for smaller ships and this being the largest design they've made for a long time, the Proetida is able to carry more than most human freighters and significantly more than the Geocoris thanks to redesigned cargo pods and spacious internal areas. For that it fits into the gap between larger human freighters like Bluewhale and Conveyor.

name: AYS-19 Peytoia

turrets.angle: 0 #angle 0 to force idle angle forward instead of between the arcs.

description: With the recent development of new Unfettered ships and the deployment of Pond Striders and Fleas to counter them, the Hai soon developed a new heavily armed heavy freighter that is also capable of carrying drones to defend itself when flying past risky areas.

name: H-1 Cycloida
description: The first product of your own shipyard. Adapted for human technologies and materials from sketches and technical notes by the Unfettered engineer Tounei. This humble freighter that happens to be very good for smuggling and evading authorities.

name: H-2 Halicyne
description: A heavy freighter designed by Tounei with improved smuggling capability over the Cyclodia. While not a warship it is very well capable of dealing with one.

name: oU923 Isoxys
description: A massive mobile shipyard built to repair and refit warships just behind the frontline decreasing logisitic burden of bring a damaged ship back to port.

name: Type-13 Sea Strait
description: A large Wanderer freighter iterated from the Deep River using the same style of cargo pod and arrangement but twice doubling the capacity. It is also better armed than Deep River to protect itself during evacuations, though it is considered by many captains to still be insufficient to fly alone.

name: MGF: Aplomado
description: Started from some veteran pirates modifying their Falcon to suit their need of long range durable cargo ship which eventually results in the Aplomado. Very little of the Falcon it was based on is left as the ship was upgraded and redesigned over the years, with other pirate captain showing interest and present enough money the Aplomado eventually becomes mass produced.

name: MGF: Eleonorae
description: Originally heavily modified Tarazed Falcon by commissioned by some member of the Crossguard Patrol group to be used as long-range fast cruiser with built-in advanced sensors to fight pirates and catch smugglers. Now it's a complete redesign with some outline resemblance to the Tarazed Falcon. Unlike the expertly modified Marauder ships or Aplomado hastily built by pirates, the Eleonorae was optimized and constructed with some of the best tech in Human space, it was rumoured that some component is actually derived from confidential military-grade technology. This made it potentially the of the most advanced warship civilian could get their hand on.

name: MGF: Battle Bulk
description: Results of pirates wondering what to do with captured Bulk Freighters as they were too slow and cumbersome for smuggling. The Battle Bulk were often used to battle against rival gang or the navy.

name: MGF: Battle Behemoth
description: To improve upon the Behemoth's already decent combat capability the pirates made extensive modifications to it and turn it into proper warship with large cargo hold perfect for plundering.

name: PAS-2 Bulwark
description: In order to quickly get a ship to match the Navy Cruiser and Carrier the Free Worlds has also opted for a modified version of the FG-5 Bluewhale replacing cargo containers with turret mounts effectively converting it into a formidable weapon platform outgunning nearly all ship in human space.

name: PCS-4 Castle
description: Modified from the FG-7 Conveyor, the Castle rivals even the Navy's Spetum class in terms of raw fighter capacity. However, it still can't compete when it comes to fighter servicing and ship's combat capability.

name: CS-24 Garrison
description: Garrison is a light carrier for protecting merchant convoy and base for guarding trade route.

name: CSE-6 Steward
description: Steward is an escort carrier with decent firepower. While it can handle most threat up to a medium warship by itself. Its small complement of fighters can assist defending far end of convoys from small attacks, but anything more than a few interceptors will be troubling.

name: AP-22 Fusillade
description: A secret Syndicate prototype warship packed with up to more than 50 guns for taking down anyone who stand in its way.

name: AP-7 Sentinel
description: A step up from the Vanguard featuring even more frontal guns.

name: SC-1 Alcazar
description: Massive mobile battle station with enough space for a small town. Only few of these are known to exist at certain location serving as major deterrence against pirates. It is said that one of these station would be enough to halt an entire battle fleet.

name: A-14F Rondel
description: A relatively recent fighter/bomber developed alongside the Spetum to provide more effective anti-ship capability.

Missions: MGF Addition: ATHI: NI Quarg Assistance 2
MGF Addition: Wanderers: Sestor: Farpoint Attack 1
MGF Addition: Wanderers: Sestor: Farpoint Attack 2
MGF Addition: Wanderers: Sestor: Farpoint Attack 2 (Lucerne)

name: MGF: Culverin Class
description: A large arsenal ship recently developed and deployed by the navy. The Culverin Class arsenal ship carries over dozens of missile launchers and over half a thousand missiles to saturate the entire battlefield with enough missiles to easily overwhelm even the best anti-missile system available.

name: MGF: Spetum Class
description: Republic Navy Spetum Class Fleetcarrier is a massive carrier that doubles as mobile headquarter projecting power not only within the system but also to nearby systems. Spetum Class is the first spaceship to carry a complement of fighters on par with wet navy carriers of 20th century. With over 5 times more capacity than older carrier fleets appearance of a single Spetum Class can turn the tide of a battle. Public reaction was mixed, while the ship itself it a feat of engineering and a mark of progress in a way some thought the budget could've been better spent else where. Though the ship will be a major deterrence against pirates some were also concerned about the lives of fighter pilots who where often just cannon fodder. Nevertheless armchair generals were all at least somewhat satisfied with what they would consider an actual carrier.

name: MGF: Ranseur Class
description: The Ranseur Class is considered a sub-class of Spetum with several major improvements across the broad.

name: MGF: Dulle Griet Class
description: Dulle Griet class fast battleship was developed as a solution to very limited production capacity of Canaveral Naval Yard thus another design was drafted up. The fast battleship was designed to be smaller and easier to build allowing more shipyard to build them in times of need. Unlike the Claymore which was designed to take on entire fleet by itself Dulle Griet could serve both as flagship for small patrol and escort for larger carriers like Spetum or Lucerne. Dulle Griet class primary armament is the advanced Eteron torpedoes to shatter any opposing warship before whittling the last of them down with 4 dual V85 railgun turrets and array of flakcannons.

name: MGF: Grose Bochse Class
description: Stemming from the same development line the Grose Bochse is designed to fit the ExP302 Railcannon, a slightly smaller version of the Railcannon used by Lucerne class and Claymore class now build into a smaller, cheaper, and easier to build frame. With tremendous firepower and range these ships were intended to form the backline of a battle bombarding enemy ships from far beyond their reach.

name: MGF: Claymore Class
description: Developed shortly after the alien attack at Farpoint as dedicated weapon platform very heavily armed with multiple large anti-capital turrets enough to shred most warships in seconds, it is essentially a mobile battlestation to fend off against future alien attack.

name: MGF: Lucerne Class
description: Republic Navy Supercarrier-Battleship hybrid heavily armed with multiple railgun turrets capable of tearing down smaller ships in seconds. While officially claimed to be recently developed to face against future alien invasion threat it was rumoured to be in research and development long before the war with Free Worlds for potential aggression from the Quarg or someone as advanced as them. The ship itself is by far the largest interstellar vessel ever built by humanity truly going into the territory of mobile space station rather as their scale could be measured in kilometers.

name: CK80Tp Death Harmonica
description: Heavily modified CK80T Tlielart freighter with 6 massive guns inplace of the cargo pods. The internal structure of the ship have also been reinforced (if not entirely overhauled in some area) to support the firing of its massive guns.

name: PCS-5 Citadel
description: With the formation of the Free Worlds and them looking for carriers, MarStel Industries took this opportunity to convert the Tlielart into full fledged carrier however the development took too long and they were too late as the Free Worlds ended up picking others as their carrier. Though, thanks to its massive size it's capable of carrying enormous amount of fighter as well as larger carried ships unmatched by any other carrier at the time of its development. Due to this it got some interest as mobile service station for the Free Worlds patrol fleets and got adopted as part of the Free Worlds navy after some modification to improve its capability.

name: SWV4 Ravelin
description: Modified version of the Southbound Shipyards Bastion into a carried version in anticipation for new Free Worlds carrier PCS-5 Citadel. Removing now unnecessary hyperdrive and fuel for extra space for other systems. Though before the carrier development was complete another shipyard where able to develop and mass produce a ship capable of carrying Medium Warships allowing Southbound to release the Ravelin early.

name: TCM-23 Harrier
description: With the new type of carrier for larger ships on the market Tarazed Coporation quickly modifies one of their Osprey into Pocket Medium Warship removing its hyperspace capability in exchange for additional space for outfits and weapons for additional firepower and survivability.

name: F-VC56 Kaga
description: Initially a plan pitched to the Republic Navy as they seek a new fleet carrier with enough capacity for 80 fighters now brought back into development as they realized the looming threat of aliens from all sides and funding to spare. Though the original plan was already considerably expensive, the additional development and modernization for new goal rise the cost through the roof. Unlike its predecessors Zuiho and Zuikaku the Kaga was not designed for mercantile escort (and for advertisement) and deterrence with most threat being large pirate fleet where it still have to be somewhat economically viable to build and operate. Kaga Class is designed for greatest chance of victory in combat against potentially more advanced alien with capacity for 90 fighters spread across 3 flight decks for rapid deployment and recovery along with a large array of cutting-edge armaments to out gun any alien warship it may find.

name: F-VC38e Shokaku
description: MJK export fleetcarrier. Though not as advanced and lacked the firepower of carriers used by their internal security, it carries the most amount of fighter compared to other carrier available to the public. Unlike the highly advanced, expensive, and restricted Kaga-class, Shokaku is designed to be vastly simpler to build and maintain allow it to be operated by organizations more concerned with budget but still want a highly capable fleetcarrier.

name: L-VC28 Zuikaku
description: NGK Hauling custom built light carrier for escorting their freighters as piracy raises. Built with unique technology by one of the most advanced shipyard resulting in one of the most advanced carrier in human space.

Missions: MGF: NGK Resist Pug Invasion: System Patrol

name: E-VC14 Zuiho
description: Zuiho is an escort carrier initially modified from the Steward but later models are now purpose-built. It was designed to offer NGK fleets advantage over other fleets that utilize commercially available ship including the pirates. Said modifications includes larger hangar bay, improved armour and shielding, as well as larger fuel tank to keep up with the fleet.

Missions: MGF: NGK Resist Pug Invasion: System Patrol

name: S-FS06 Reisen
description: A very light and agile but heavily armed space superiority and attack fighter developed by MJK Heavy Industries packed with latest and most advanced systems and powerful thrusters, outrunning and outgunning every other fighter in human space. Also thanks to it's slim profile the ship is remarkably more difficult to hit than any other fighters further improving its survivability. The ship also employ the latest S-270 Shield Regenerator and thus have pre-tuned shields to work with this specific shield regenerator. Though due to its extreme speed and maneuverbility it requires the best of pilots and rigourous training to fully utilize its potential.

name: H-BS140 Yamato
description: The Yamato is a heavy battleship designed to utilize few large and heavy turret as primary armament drawing inspiration from an ancient naval battleship of the same name. It also uses large array of VLS missiles as additional firepower. To compensate for lack of turn rate of the large turret it employs a large array of smaller turrets to protect itself against smaller and faster vessels and missiles. Large spinal cannon is also equipped on bow of the ship that can deal a massive amount of damage to any enemy vessel. The ship is also notably a lot larger than its namesake to fit all the required technologies employing latest iteration of highly efficient and durable shield emitter as well as large array of defensive anti-missile and anti-fighter turrets.

name: E-FD23 Kanran
description: Kanran is a very old destroyer designed by MJK heavy industries for their security department to protect their properties as well as raiding enemy convoys during the first turf war and sequentially also participated in the Alpha War. At its time it was considered one of the most advanced ship in the sky second only to those from the Deep and with sheer number it was manufactured many survived the conflict and were continually improved that some still survives to this day. Production of this model fluctuates over time but generally on descending trend before stopping not long after the formation of the Republic. Now most of Kanran on the market are ones decomissioned from NGK fleets.

name: PAS-3 Barbette
description: With the imminent war the Free Worlds need as much firepower as they can get. The Jupiter class is next on their list as one of the biggest ship around. Its cargo bay replaced with huge turret mounts, additional armour and shield emitter installed as well as reinforced interiors they turned the freighter into a formidable warship.

name: FUe02y Gebrant Tender
description: A refitted Gebrant with gears for attaching warship inplace of the usual cargo pods to act as hyperspace carrier vessel for a medium warship allow the warship to strip of hyperspace capbility for additional space for other combat systems. The ship it self is also refitted with additional turret mounts to also provide some firepower itself as well along with adjusted shield emitter layout for better efficiency as it's not expected to be pushing cargo pods anymore and improve survivability now with the ship is expected to see more combat.

name: GKS-48 Zummenstoss
description: A recently developed warship with focus on turrets and use it to tear down their opponent from any angle unlike most other warship on the market at the time of release. It also comes with unique weapon to surprise any enemy they face and rapidly tear down their shields.

name: Typ012 Guangzhou
description: Guangzhou class battleship designed and built by CCS Corp. is one of the largest commercially avaliable warship at its time of release often taking the role of heavy escort for cargo fleets. Though it is one of the most expensive warship on the civilian market its firepower is unmatched making it a prime choice for captains looking for non-carrier heavy escort.

name: Typ057 Lanzhou
description: Lanzhou class is a destoryer made by CCS Corp. for merchantile escort. It is one of the toughest of the category but also almost the slowest one only beaten by the Navy Frigate. Advertisement claims: "Beaten a Falcon stock.*" *Zai shiyan shi tiaojian xia. Qujue yu feixingyuan de jishu.

name: Typ064 Xuchang
description: Xuchang class frigate is designed and built to be a cheap but effective escort warship, at least on paper. It's true effectivness is still a topic for debate on the hypernet with some saying they have been scammed and other claiming it can even beat a Navy Frigate with proper kitting and tactics.

name: Typ073 Xinhui
description: Xinhui class is a small gunboat for light escort duty. It's very cheap and claimed to be highly effective against both large and small warships with general purpose J13 gun turret and a missile turret to deal with stronger threats.

name: Typ344 Zhenhua
description: A light carrier from CCS with minimal ability to defend itself.

name: KM50T Stetnel
description: This is a modified version of the CK50T Stahbar turned into a dedicated warship with additional turrets and bay for up to 6 fighters to handle smaller, faster ships.

name: GX-77 Xpulse
description: The Xpulse is a original custom-build warship for Galactic Express. It features a spinal-mounted mass driver as its primary weapon and deterrent. Derived from their early research on mass driver for interplanetary cargo delivery.

Missions: MGF: GX Frontier Escort (Core, Dangerous Destination)
MGF: GX Frontier Escort (Core, Dangerous Source)
MGF: GX Frontier Escort (North, Dangerous Destination)
MGF: GX Frontier Escort (North, Dangerous Source)
MGF: GX Frontier Escort (South, Dangerous Destination)
MGF: GX Frontier Escort (South, Dangerous Source)
MGF: GX Large Frontier Escort (South, Dangerous Destination)

name: AKH-8C Mlitgante
description: A conversion of the tow ship into a very agile warship by removing the bulky tow system and other salvaging tools in favor of two gun ports for additional firepower. First few of these were converted on rare occasion where the Ankulah station needed to rapidly replenish its force after a major pirate attack. Though later on a small number of them were built as more pilots became interested in it.

name: MGF: Pirate Galley
description: Pirate Galley is less of a ship but rather a class of scraps quickly cobbled together into what could barely be called a ship by some pirates. Other than questionable quality, it's characterized by large amount of weapon installation and horrid shielding efficiency. Creation of these scrap heaps appear to be desperate solution to larger and more heavily armed merchant convoys.

name: MGF: Pirate Galleon
description: A larger variant of the Pirate Galleys. These Galleons can pack a larger array of armaments and are usually quite a lot tougher than Pirate Galley making it much more of a threat to shipping. While it could be easily defeated by modern warships, it can be a disaster for most merchant fleets lacking such heavy escort.

name: KS-13 Molot
description: Ancient patrol and raiding ship from KDB. It's far from comfortable even for its' time with internal space taken up buy layers or armor and systems. It earned a reputation of being fast and reliable thanks to its' RD-550 engines allowing it to out maneuver most other ship of the time and out gun their enemies with five frontal guns. 	Although way past its' intended lifetime, a few of these can still be seen in active service with upgraded equipment. Some of which saw service through every conflict the KDB have ever been involved in.

name: ICV-136 Starlight
description: Light and fast interceptor from Bellwing with a turret mount giving it option for missile defense or even more firepower. Due to it's versatility, it's popular among both bounty hunters and militias alike.

name: ICV-122 Cherokee
description: An older medium warship design from Bellwing. While not as durable as a Firebird its' generous weapon capacity and maneuverability allows it to keep up with modern warship with raw firepower.

name: IBB-032 Wyoming
description: Ancient warship from Bellwing. While lacking in range, defense, and maneuverability by modern standards, its' firepower is still imposing enough to be kept in service as detterence.

name: MGF: RRS-016 Archer
description: Expensive and powerful light warship from VRR Shipyard. Also occasionally used as personal transport by some. Rarely seen outside of Paradise Worlds due to cost of operating one.

name: AGT-31 Xencar
description: Heavy fighter/bomber developed as more effective way to deter pirates, equipped with a powerful Atesac Plasma Cannon to make a quick work of enemy shields and chase the more cowardly pirates away.

name: GX-21b Stardust
description: A bomber used by Galactic Express fleet. Adapted from an atmospheric cargo delivery fighter.

name: oU112 Altuella
description: Although technologically superior to human, the development of new ships from the i'Hiya shipyard and arrival of newer and larger human warships have destablized the equilibrium of the battles over Wah'Ki. A few enterprising Unfettered sought to change that with the Altuella. Despite the scale of the ship outsizing the Unfettered production capacity, they manage to figure out how to build them somehow. Although slow to be built, its presence dominates the warzone like never before. 	In addition to its firepower and survivability, the Altuella also have ample cargo capacity for looting and collecting tributes.

Missions: MGF: To Build a Beast Altuella construction done
